title: Bridge Essay: Spontaneous and deliberate creative cognition during and after psilocybin exposure.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Spontaneous and deliberate creative cognition during and after psilocybin exposure.** - Transl Psychiatry (2021). DOI: 10.1038/s41398-021-01335-5. PMID: 33833225. Creativity is an essential cognitive ability linked to all areas of our everyday functioning. Thus, finding a way to enhance it is of broad interest. A large number of anecdotal reports suggest that the consumption of psychedelic drugs can enhance creative thinking; however, scientific evidence is lacking. Following a double-blind, placebo-controlled, parallel-group design, we demonstrated that psilocybin (0.17 mg/kg) induced a time- and construct-related differentiation of effects on creative t
